name: Cheese Toasts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, beat together the eggs and mayonnaise.
2. In a flat plate, combine all the remaining ingredients except the bread.
3. Trim crusts from bread and slice each piece into three strips.
4. Grease a large baking sheet.
5. Dip each piece of bread into the egg mixture, drain, then coat in cheese mixture thoroughly but not heavily. Place on prepared baking sheet.
- This step may be refrigerated for up to six hours if needed.
6. Bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 10-12 minutes or until the tops are golden.
7. Let cool on the sheet for one minute, then remove to a serving platter.
8. These are tasty when served at room temperature.
